시편 138:1.content: I will give you thanks with my whole heart. Before the gods, I will sing praises to you.

시편 138:2.content: I will bow down toward your holy temple, and give thanks to your Name for your loving kindness and for your truth; for you have exalted your Name and your Word above all.

시편 138:3.content: In the day that I called, you answered me. You encouraged me with strength in my soul.

시편 138:4.content: All the kings of the earth will give you thanks, Yahweh, for they have heard the words of your mouth.

시편 138:5.content: Yes, they will sing of the ways of Yahweh, for Yahweh’s glory is great!

시편 138:6.content: For though Yahweh is high, yet he looks after the lowly; but he knows the proud from afar.

시편 138:7.content: Though I walk in the middle of trouble, you will revive me. You will stretch out your hand against the wrath of my enemies. Your right hand will save me.

시편 138:8.content: Yahweh will fulfill that which concerns me. Your loving kindness, Yahweh, endures forever. Don’t forsake the works of your own hands.
